---
title: 'Laboratorio 9: redes neuronales'
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r carga de datos}
load("listings_modificado.RData")
```

```{r paquetes}
library(caret)
library(nnet)
```

```{r conjuntos train y test}
set.seed(123)

muestra_idx <- sample(1:nrow(listings), size = 10000)
muestra <- listings[muestra_idx, ]

n <- nrow(muestra)
train_idx <- sample(1:n, size = 0.7 * n)

train <- muestra[train_idx, ]
test <- muestra[-train_idx, ]
```


```{r variable respuesta}
cuts <- quantile(train$price, probs = c(0.33, 0.66), na.rm = TRUE)

train$price_cat <- cut(train$price,
                       breaks = c(-Inf, cuts[1], cuts[2], Inf),
                       labels = c("Economica", "Intermedia", "Cara"))

test$price_cat <- cut(test$price,
                      breaks = c(-Inf, cuts[1], cuts[2], Inf),
                      labels = c("Economica", "Intermedia", "Cara"))

train$price_cat <- as.factor(train$price_cat)
test$price_cat  <- as.factor(test$price_cat)
```

### Redes neuronales

```{r modelo 1}
set.seed(123)

modelo_nn1 <- nnet(
  price_cat ~ accommodates + bathrooms_num + bedrooms + beds +
    host_response_rate + host_acceptance_rate +
    calculated_host_listings_count + number_of_reviews +
    reviews_per_month + review_scores_rating +
    minimum_nights + availability_365 +
    room_type + host_is_superhost + instant_bookable + bathroom_type,
  data = train,
  size = 4,        # numero de neuronas ocultas
  decay = 5e-4,    # decay
  maxit = 200,
  trace = FALSE
)

# Predicción modelo 1
pred_nn1 <- predict(modelo_nn1, newdata = test, type = "class")
pred_nn1 <- factor(pred_nn1, levels = levels(test$price_cat))
matriz_nn1 <- confusionMatrix(pred_nn1, test$price_cat)
matriz_nn1
```

```{r modelo 2}
set.seed(123)

modelo_nn2 <- nnet(
  price_cat ~ accommodates + bathrooms_num + bedrooms + beds +
    host_response_rate + host_acceptance_rate +
    calculated_host_listings_count + number_of_reviews +
    reviews_per_month + review_scores_rating +
    minimum_nights + availability_365 +
    room_type + host_is_superhost + instant_bookable + bathroom_type,
  data = train,
  size = 10,        # número de neuronas ocultas
  decay = 1e-4,    # menos decay que el modelo 1
  maxit = 700,     # más iteraciones que el modelo 1
  trace = FALSE
)

# Predicción modelo 2
pred_nn2 <- predict(modelo_nn2, newdata = test, type = "class")
pred_nn2 <- factor(pred_nn2, levels = levels(test$price_cat))
matriz_nn2 <- confusionMatrix(pred_nn2, test$price_cat)
matriz_nn2
```


```{r inciso 8}

set.seed(123)


control <- trainControl(method = "cv", number = 5)


grid <- expand.grid(size = c(2, 4, 6),
                    decay = c(1e-4, 5e-4, 1e-3))


modelo_tuneado <- train(
  price_cat ~ accommodates + bathrooms_num + bedrooms + beds +
    host_response_rate + host_acceptance_rate +
    calculated_host_listings_count + number_of_reviews +
    reviews_per_month + review_scores_rating +
    minimum_nights + availability_365 +
    room_type + host_is_superhost + instant_bookable + bathroom_type,
  data = train,
  method = "nnet",
  tuneGrid = grid,
  trControl = control,
  maxit = 200,
  trace = FALSE
)


print(modelo_tuneado$bestTune)


pred_tuneado <- predict(modelo_tuneado, newdata = test)
matriz_tuneada <- confusionMatrix(pred_tuneado, test$price_cat)
matriz_tuneada
```

### Modelos de Regresión

```{r inciso 9 - variable respuesta regresion}


formula_reg <- price ~ accommodates + bathrooms_num + bedrooms + beds +
  host_response_rate + host_acceptance_rate +
  calculated_host_listings_count + number_of_reviews +
  reviews_per_month + review_scores_rating +
  minimum_nights + availability_365 +
  room_type + host_is_superhost + instant_bookable + bathroom_type

```
